lines.stage_direction: He kisses her and they sit down.

scenes.scene_description: Finally, Monica with her parents on her arms start down the aisle.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You look beautiful. Is this new?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Not now.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay.

scenes.scene_description: Chandler steps off the altar to greet his bride-to-be.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Who is this?

lines.speaker: The Rabbi
lines.text: I am Father Kalebasous.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: He’s Greek Orthodox.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: As are you…

lines.speaker: The Rabbi
lines.text: Let us begin. Dearly beloved…

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That’s my line! I can take it from here, thanks. Dearly beloved, I’m sorry I’m a little late. You may be confused by this now, but you won’t be Memorial Day weekend 2002. Well, let’s get started before the groom takes off again. Huh? We are gathered here today, to join this man and this woman in the bonds of holy matrimony. I’ve known Monica and Chandler for a long time, and I can not imagine two people more perfect for each other. And now, as I’ve left my notes in my dressing room. We shall proceed to the vows. Monica?
lines.stage_direction: entering He walks up the aisle and to the rabbi To all He’s still in costume Monica is shocked and looks around.

scenes.scene_description: They both step up onto the altar and she notices the rabbi.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: He took off?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Go on! Go on.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler, for so long I…I wondered if I would ever find my prince, my soul mate. Then three years ago, at another wedding I turned to a friend for comfort. And in stead, I found everything that I’d ever been looking for my whole life. And now…here we are…with our future before us…and I only want to spend it with you, my prince, my soul mate, my friend. Unless you don’t want to. You go!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Chandler?

scenes.scene_description: She turns to get her vows from Rachel.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, that’s okay. Monica I thought this was going to be the most difficult thing I ever gonna had to do. But when I saw you walking down that aisle I realized how simple it was. I love you. Any surprises that come our way it’s okay, because I will always love you. You are the person I was meant to spend the rest of my life with. You wanna know if I’m sure?
lines.stage_direction: To Ross Ross nods and retreats. He leans in and kisses her.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You may not kiss the bride. So, I guess by the powers vested in my by the state of New York and the Internet guys, I now pronounce you husband and wife. Oh wait! Do you take each other?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I do.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I do.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah you do!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Rings?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Aw crap! Okay—uh…uh let’s-let’s do the rings.

scenes.scene_description: Ross leans in to give Chandler his vows.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: We good? Yeah? Good? Once again, I pronounce you husband and wife. Now kiss her again.

scenes.scene_description: Chandler and Monica both turn, take the rings from Ross and Rachel respectively, and place them on each other’s fingers.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I love you. And I know about the baby.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What baby?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Our baby.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We have a baby?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Phoebe found your pregnancy test in the trash.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I didn’t take a pregnancy test.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Then…who did?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh and they’re gonna have a baby.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh-huh.

scenes.scene_description: They kiss and everyone applauds.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take
scenes.scene_description: The camera zooms in on Rachel who has a very worried and frightened look on her face and she slowly takes a deep breath.

title: The One With Chandler and Monica’s Wedding

lines.speaker: Part I Written by
lines.text: Greg Malins

lines.speaker: Part II Written by
lines.text: David Crane & Marta Kauffman

lines.speaker: Parts I & II Transcribed by
lines.text: Eric Aasen

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Do you realize this is probably the last time we’ll all be here in the coffee house as six single people?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Why?! What’s happening to the coffee house?! Oh!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yep! From now on its gonna be the four of you guys and me and the misses. The little woman. The wife. The old ball and chain.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Old?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The young hot ball and chain.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That’s much better.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Op! We gotta go!
lines.stage_direction: checking her watch The girls stand up.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, where are you guys going?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We’re gonna pick up the wedding dress then we’re gonna have lunch with mom.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ah. Joey you’re-you’re having lunch with my mom?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, I-I just heard lunch. But yeah, I can go. Sure!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y’know what? Actually I’m kinda glad they’re leaving ‘cause uh, I need to talk to you about something.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What’s up?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well this uh, this may be a little awkward.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Listen, if you want to borrow money, its kind of a bad time. I’m buying dinner for 128 people tomorrow night.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, its…Its not that. Umm, now what I’m going to say to you, I’m not saying as your friend. Okay? I’m-I’m saying as it as Monica’s older brother.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But you’re still my friend?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Not for the next few minutes.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: During this time…are you, are you still my best man?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Do I still call you Ross?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay! You guys are getting married tomorrow and-and I couldn’t be more thrilled for both of you, but as Monica’s older brother I-I have to tell you this. If you ever hurt my little sister, if you ever cause her any unhappiness of any kind, I will hunt you down, and kick your ass! What? I’m-I’m-I’m serious! Come—Hey! Dude! Stop it! Okay? I’m-I’m not kidding here!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, I hear what your saying, okay? And, thanks for the warning.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No problem.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So are we…friends again?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. You won’t believe what Monica’s older brother just said to me!

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk, everyone is there.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What ‘cha doing Mon?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I’m making a list of all the things that are most likely to go wrong at the wedding. Now, that way I can be prepared.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What are they?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, so far I have uh, my bride’s maids dresses won’t get picked up, my veil gets lost, or I don’t have my something blue.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey! Those are all the things I’m responsible for!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I had to go with the odds Rach.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! You guys! Remember that audition I had a while ago and didn’t get the part?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: The commercial?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That play?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That other play?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Nooo!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: The movie?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yes!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yes that’s the one about the soldiers who fight in World War I!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, yeah! Back then y’know, we called the Great War. It really was!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well anyway, the guy they wanted backed out and now they want me! I start shooting today!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Congratulations!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh that’s great!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wait! Wait! Wait! You can’t start today! Today’s the rehearsal dinner!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh no, I’ll be done by then.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh. Well then way to go you big movie star!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know! All right, I’ll see you guys over there! I’m off to fight the Nazis.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, wait Joey! We fought the Nazis in World War II, not World War I.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoa! Okay. Yeah well, who-who was in World War I?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Go ahead.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You’re gonna be late! Go! Go!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Who did we fight in World War I?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Mexico?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes! Very good.

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler's, the girls are having breakfast.

lines.speaker: The Assistant Director
lines.text: Hey Joey! We’re ready.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! Me too.

lines.speaker: The Assistant Director
lines.text: Richard? We’re ready for you. Joey Tribbiani? This is Richard Crosby he’s playing Vincent.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I’m doing my scenes with you?

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Nice to meet you Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow! I can’t believe this! This is incredible. I mean you just won an Oscar!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: No I didn’t.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I think you did.

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: I think I lost. Three times.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh…Cookie?

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: Okay! We’re about an hour away from getting the scene lit. So uh, if you guys don’t mind, can we run it a couple of times?

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Yeah, sure.

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: Okay, all right. Let’s do it. And…Action!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: We have to find the rest of the platoon!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Forget the platoon! The platoon is gone!
lines.stage_direction: He is spitting on the hard Ps and Ts.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: The platoon is dead! Face facts Tony!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So what are we gonna do?! We have no reinforcements! No-no food!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: No, we still have food in the basement! I saw potatoes and some dry pasta!

scenes.scene_description: Pier 59 Studios, Joey is in costume and standing at the craft services table. He checks his pockets and finds some prop coins in a pouch, which he replaces with some cookies.

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: Hang on a minute! Joey, you keep touching your face. Is something wrong?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No. Nope, I uh…I th—I thought it might be kind of a cool character thing. Y’know? He’s uh, he’s a face toucher.

scenes.scene_description: Joey wipes his eye.

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: I don’t think so. Let’s take it back to Richard’s last line. Action!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: We may not have any weapons, but we still have food. In the basement I saw potatoes and some dry pasta, and a few tins of tuna!
lines.stage_direction: Joey backs away and wipes his face again.

scenes.scene_description: Behind his back, Richard is nodding no.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Honey, we gotta go!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. Here’s a question you never have to ask. My dad just called and wanted to know if he could borrow one of your pearl necklaces.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I don’t have anything like that, but let me go see if Rachel does.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, include more people in this.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, do you realize that at this time tomorrow we’ll be getting married?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wait a minute! I have a date tomorrow night.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I just, I can’t believe that we made it!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well you don’t have to sound so surprised.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I’m sorry but…nothing.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well…honestly ever since we got engaged I have been waiting for something to, to flip you out.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Honestly? Me too.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah. Y’know I keep thinking that something stupid is gonna come up and I’ll go all…Chandler. But nothing has.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ohh, I’m so glad. Thank you so much for staying so calm during this. I mean it’s really, it’s made me stay calm. I coulda been worse!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. I’ll be right there.

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler's, Monica is standing in the kitchen ready to leave for the rehearsal dinner.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi! If you’re calling before Saturday, you’ve reached Monica and Chandler. But if you’re calling after Saturday, you’ve reached Mr. and Mrs. Bing! Please leave a message for the Bings!

scenes.scene_description: She exits and as Chandler picks up his coat, the phone rings and the answering machine gets it.
Chandler freaks out and loosens his tie.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Maureen! Gosh! Hey uh, Chandler? This is my cousin Maureen.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We’re the Bings.

scenes.scene_description: The Rehearsal Dinner, Chandler and Monica are greeting guests as they arrive. A woman enters.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi! Oh you guys look so beautiful!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Mr. and Mrs. Bing!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow Monica! Hey, just so you know I had my uh, older brother chat with Chandler.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What is that?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well I…I told him that if he ever hurt you I would hunt him down and kick his ass! What?! What?! What is the matter with everybody?! I am serious! I would kick his ass!
lines.stage_direction: The girls all laugh. The laugh harder.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ross, please! My make-up!

scenes.scene_description: Phoebe and Rachel walk up.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Chandler!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Mom. Thanks for wearing something.
lines.stage_direction: They hug. She’s wearing a tight dress with a lot of cleavage showing.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Oh honey! This is so exciting! I thought we screwed you up so bad this day would never come. Oh and just think. Soon there’ll be lots of little Bings.

scenes.scene_description: Chandler’s Mom enters and Chandler meets her by the door.
He freaks out and loosens the tie again.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Mrs. Bing? Here, these are my parents umm, Judy and Jack Geller.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.text: It’s lovely to meet you.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: So are you his mother or his father?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.text: Jack!

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: What?! I’ve never seen one before!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Dad! There’s Ross , why don’t you go talk to him?

scenes.scene_description: Monica and her parents walk up.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: I didn’t even have a chance to act as though I’m okay with it!

lines.speaker: Mr. Bing
lines.text: Hello all!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi…dad.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi Mr.…Bing.

lines.speaker: Mr. Bing
lines.text: Nora!

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Charles.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It-it’s so great to see you both here.

lines.speaker: Mr. Bing
lines.text: Yes! Although, I think we may be seeing a little too much of some people. Aren’t you a little old to be wearing a dress like that?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Don’t you have a little too much penis to be wearing a dress like that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: …of course you can kick his ass son.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.text: You could kick anyone’s ass you want too.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thanks you guys.
lines.stage_direction: Walks away happily and his parents smile.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, Rach! Rach! Umm hey, could you do me a favor and would talk to Chandler’s dad and try to keep him away from Chandler’s mom?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! But I don’t know what he looks like!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: He is the man in the black dress.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Man in the black dress… Hi! I’m Rachel! I’m a friend of Monica and Chandler’s!
lines.stage_direction: Monica walks away and Rachel looks around to find a woman in a black dress. To her

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: I’m Amanda.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh I get it! A…man…duh!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Can I have everyone’s attention please? I’m uh; I’m Ross Geller.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Doctor Ross Geller.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Dad…dad, please! As I was saying umm, I’m Dr. Ross Geller. Uhh, and I’m the best man. And uh, this marriage is doubly special for me umm, because not only is the groom my best friend but uh, the bride is my little sister. And, she’s the greatest sister a guy could ask for. So if you’d all please join me in raising a glass to the, the couple we’re here to celebrate. To the Bings.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: To the Bings!

scenes.scene_description: Mr. and Mrs. Geller start to walk away.
Everyone clinks glasses and Chandler freaks out again.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, I’m gonna go steam my wedding dress okay? Who wants the responsibility of making sure nothing happens to it?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I’ll do it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Who wants it? Anybody?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I said I’ll do it!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Nobody wants to do it? All right, I’ll do it myself.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Monica! I’m not gonna screw it up!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Y’know what? You’re right, I’m sorry. Actually you were a big help tonight. Yeah, and thanks for putting my grandmother in the cab and making sure she got to the hotel safely.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well of course that is what I’m here for!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. Sorry.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ugh! What grandmother?

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler's, Monica, Phoebe, and Rachel are in the kitchen.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! Where have you been?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, taking my parents back to the hotel.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What? Are you going back to work?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Nice shades.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thanks. Yeah, I figure if I wear these in my scenes at least I won’t get spit in the eyes, y’know?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And if I remember correctly, Ray Ban was the official sponsor of World War I!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Great! All right. I’ll see you later.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, where’s Chandler?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh, I think he’s in Rachel’s room. See ya.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Chandler? Chandler?
lines.stage_direction: going up to Rachel’s closed door He opens the door and looks inside and doesn’t see him. He checks the bathroom and still doesn’t find him. He then finds a note on the counter. He picks it up and reads it.

scenes.scene_description: Joey and Rachel's, Joey is wearing sunglasses and as he exits his bedroom, Ross enters the apartment.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Is uh, is Monica here?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She’s steaming her dress, why? What’s up?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I think Chandler’s gone.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: He left that.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Tell Monica I’m sorry.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What’s up? Tell Monica I’m sorry. Tell her yourself!
lines.stage_direction: walking up Rachel hands her the note and she reads it. Pause

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler's, Phoebe and Rachel are in the kitchen as there is a knock on the door. Rachel answers it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God! Chandler just left though!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah but, maybe it’s not what we think. Maybe it’s tell Monica I’m sorry I…drank the last of the milk.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Or maybe he-he was writing to tell her that-that he’s changed his name, y’know? Tell Monica I’m sorry.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I think it means he freaked out and left!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Don’t be so negative! Good God! Isn’t it possible that Sorry is sitting in there right now?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. Phoebe, I-I think Ross is right. What are we gonna do?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look—Okay, I’m just gonna—I’m gonna have to go find him and bring him back! Okay? You-you make sure Monica does not find out, okay?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay but if you don’t find him and bring him back, I am gonna hunt you down and kick your ass!

scenes.scene_description: The Hallway, Ross, Phoebe, and Rachel are discussing the note.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I will, I will find him.

scenes.scene_description: Ross laughs and Phoebe points harder.

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Hey Joey, could you uh, go through these lines with me?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh man! They-they just redid my make-up!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Just the last two pages.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right.

scenes.scene_description: The Movie Set, Joey is getting his make-up touched up as Richard approaches.

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: I found the picture!

scenes.scene_description: They go onto the set.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Picture? What picture?

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Could you uh, could you lower your script? I need to see your face so I can uh, play off your reaction.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay uh, look I know you’re a great actor, okay? And you play all those Shakespeare guys and stuff…

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Oh, thanks.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But you’re spittin’ all over me man!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Well of course I am!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You know you’ve been spitting on me?!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: That’s what real actors do! Annunciation is the mark of a good actor! And when you enunciate, you spit!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow! Didn’t know that.

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Great!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thanks! Okay-okay check it out! Picture? What picture? Eh?
lines.stage_direction: Reading from the script He pauses then spits

scenes.scene_description: He’s still spitting and Joey holds his script in front of his face.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Gunther have you uh, have you seen Chandler?

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: No. No, I haven’t seen him.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh damn!

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: He’s getting married tomorrow right?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes. Yes. Don’t worry. Everything’s fine. We’ll uh, we’ll see you tomorrow at the wedding.

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: I wasn’t invited.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well then we’ll-we’ll see you the day after tomorrow. Mom?! Dad?! What-what…what you guys doing here?!
lines.stage_direction: Walks away slowly, but notices something. They’re sitting by the window.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Well you kids talk about this place so much, we thought we’d see what all the fuss is about.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.text: I certainly see what the girls like coming here.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why?!

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.text: The sexy blonde behind the counter.
lines.stage_direction: She waves at Gunther who waves back.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Gunther?!

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Your mother just added him to her list.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What? Your-your list?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.text: Yeah, the list that—of people we’re allowed to sleep…

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes! No-no! I know, I know what the list is! Mom! Look if you see Chandler, could you just let him know I’m looking for him?

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: And if you see Rita Moreno, let her know I’m looking for her.

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk, Gunther is behind the counter as Ross enters looking for Chandler.
Ross points at him and exits.

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: Action!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: I found the picture!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What picture?!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: The picture of my wife! In your pack!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You went through my personal property?

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Why do have a picture of Paulette in your pack?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Because Vincent, we were lovers. For two years!

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: Cut! Wonderful!

scenes.scene_description: The Movie Set, Richard and Joey are doing a scene.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Great scene yeah?

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Oh you’re awesome! And, in that last speech? You soaked me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thanks a lot.

lines.speaker: The Assistant Director
lines.text: Here’s your call sheet for tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, I’m-I’m not working tomorrow.

lines.speaker: The Assistant Director
lines.text: You are now.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! No! I can’t! You gotta get me out of it! I’ve got plans! Important plans!

scenes.scene_description: Joey and Richard both wipe their faces and are given towels.
The AD walks away wiping his face.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross said there’s still no word from Chandler.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh man.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh but he did say that they found the grandmother wandering down fifth avenue.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay. Well there’s one down.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I’m getting married today!!! I think I just cracked a rib. But I don’t care because today’s my wedding day! My day is finally here!!
lines.stage_direction: entering from her room, excitedly She trips and falls. Getting up Runs back into her room.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Y’know she might not even notice he’s gone.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I’m gonna start getting ready!
lines.stage_direction: re-entering Goes back into her room.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: God! Don’t—We can’t let her start getting ready! This is too awful! Oh God, but wait she’ll be in the gown and then he won’t show up and then she’s gonna have to take off the gown…

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Shhh! Stop it! Stop it Rachel! You can’t do this here!
lines.stage_direction: She drags her into the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I’m sorry. I’m sorry. It’s just…It’s just so sad!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, but you’ve got to pull yourself together! Monica can’t see you like this! Then she’ll know something’s wrong!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know. I know. Oh God. There’s no tissue! Can you grab me some toilet paper?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah. Oh, that’s gone too. This is Monica’s bathroom right?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No-no! I-I…I found one.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler's, the next morning, Rachel and Phoebe are eating breakfast.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh thank you! Oh God! Can I have another one?
lines.stage_direction: Wiping her nose. She throws it out.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Sure. Do you need some floss?
lines.stage_direction: looking into the trash can Reaching into the trash can. Grabs a piece of it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh God I just can not imagine what is gonna happen if Chandler doesn’t show up!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh here’s a whole bunch.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I mean she’s gonna be at the wedding waiting for him and people will be whispering, "Oh that poor girl." Y’know? Then she’ll have to come back here and live all alone.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God!
lines.stage_direction: finding something interesting in the trash can

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: There was a pregnancy test in the garbage, and it’s positive. Monica’s pregnant. So I guess she won’t be totally alone.

scenes.scene_description: Phoebe reaches into the trash can, pulls one out, and hands it to Rachel.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know! Monica’s gonna have a baby! Hey, can this count as her something new?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey, do you think this is why Chandler took off?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, she had to have just taken that test because I took out the trash last night.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh God, this is turning into the worst wedding day ever! The bride is pregnant. The groom is missing. And I’m still holding this.
lines.stage_direction: She throws the test back into the trash.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay Phoebe, we can not tell anyone about this.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, okay. Hey, wait. Do you know what kind of birth control she was using?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No. Why?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Just for the future, this is hardly a commercial for it.

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler’s bathroom, the scene is continued from earlier.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Anything?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No! I talked to Joey on the set, he hasn’t heard from him. I-I-I talked to Chandler’s parents again!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You told them he was missing?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No! I made it seem like I was just calling to chat. Pretty sure, they both think I’m interested in them.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, we’ve got to tell her he’s gone.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No! Hey! Hey! We can’t!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, she’s gonna start getting ready soon!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, can’t you at least stall her a little? I’ll-I’ll go back to some of the places I went last night.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, well how much time do you need?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well how much time before she absolutely has to start getting ready?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: One hour.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Give me two.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Then why do you ask?!

scenes.scene_description: Joey and Rachel's, Ross is just hanging up the phone as Rachel and Phoebe enter.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, wish me luck.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay. I’m going with you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ross, you’re tired. You’ve been looking all night. And clearly you suck at this.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, I’ll see you guys later.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay. Wait, do you know how you’re going to stall her?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I’ll figure something out.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thanks.

scenes.scene_description: They all go into the hallway.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! Okay, so I thought we’d start with my make up and then do my hair.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay uh, but before you do that. I-I, I need you to talk to me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: About what?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Umm… I’m never gonna getting married!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah you will! The right guy is just around the corner! Okay, are we done with that?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No Monica! I’m serious! Oh, maybe I should just forget about it. Become a lesbian or something.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Any woman would be lucky to have ya.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well maybe it would make me feel better if I slept with Joey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rachel! You okay?

scenes.scene_description: Phoebe and Ross go to look for Chandler and Rachel enters Monica and Chandler’s.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Excuse me, Aaron? Hi! Umm, I have a little problem with the schedules. Originally, I wasn’t supposed to work today, and I have this wedding that I really have to be at. It’s my best friend’s, and I’m officiating so I really can’t work past four.

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: Joey, you gotta stay until the end. We can’t stop filming just for you. It’s not like it’s your wedding.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I’m having surgery!

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, I-I just made up the stuff about the wedding because I didn’t want you to worry about me. But, I’m having surgery today.

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: What kind of surgery?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Transplant.

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: But you’re supposed to work on Monday.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hair transplant.

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: But you’re not bald.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It’s not on my head.

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: Look Joey, there’s nothing I can do. Besides, you’re probably gonna be out by four anyway. We’ve just got one short scene. It’s just you and Richard, and God knows he’s a pro. You’ll be fine. Morning Richard.
lines.stage_direction: Walks away and sees Richard entering.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! You’re here! Great! Great! Great! Let’s get going buddy, we’ve got a scene to shoot!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: I’m wearing two belts.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Are you drunk?

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yes you are!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: All right.

scenes.scene_description: The Movie Set, Joey is reporting for work.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We are never gonna find him! He’s one guy in a huge city!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God! Is that him?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That is an old, Chinese woman!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: He could be in disguise, y’know.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Aw, y’know…Y’know, maybe we’re-we’re just approaching this all wrong. If you’re Chandler and-and you wanna hide, where is the last place on Earth people would think you’d go?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So this is your office?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: How did you guys find me? I knew I should’ve hid at the gym!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What the hell are you doing?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Panicking! And using the Internet to try to prove that I’m related to Monica. How is she?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: She’s fine. She doesn’t know you’re gone. And she doesn’t have to know, okay? Now come on, we’re going home.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No! No! No! I can’t do that!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Why not?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Because if I go home, we’re gonna become the Bings! I can’t be the Bings!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What’s wrong with being the Bings?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The Bings have horrible marriages! They yell. They fight. And they use the pool boy as a pawn in their sexual games!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Chandler, have you ever put on a black cocktail dress and asked me up to your hotel room?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Then you are neither of your parents!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It’s not just their marriage! I mean, look at yours. Look at everybody’s! The only person that can make marriage work is Paul Newman! And I’ve met me; I am not Paul Newman. I don’t race cars! I don’t make popcorn! None of my proceeds go to charity.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: But look Chandler, right now, no one has a lower opinion of you than I do. But I totally believe you can do this.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I want to. I love her so much, but I’m afr…It’s too huge.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y’know, okay. You’re right. It is huge. So why don’t we take it just a little bit at a time? Okay? Umm, forget getting married for a sec; just forget about it. Can you just come home and take a shower?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well yeah, but then…

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah—No-but-but-but-but! We’re just gonna go home and take a shower. Now, that’s not scary right?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Depends on what you mean by we.

scenes.scene_description: A Street, Phoebe and Ross are exiting a pizza place.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: The nights are the hardest. But then the day comes! And that’s every bit as hard as the night. And then the night comes again…

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: The days and nights are hard! I get it! Okay? Look umm, Rachel I’m sorry! I have to start getting ready! I’m getting married today!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know. At dusk. That’s such a hard time for me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I’m gonna go put my make up on, we have to be at the hotel in an hour!
lines.stage_direction: getting up Starts for the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. But wait!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Let’s go to lunch.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I can’t go to lunch!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Right.

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler's, Rachel is still trying to stall Monica.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh good God! I’ve fallen down!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What’s going on?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. All right. Honey listen. When I tell you what I’m about to tell you, I need you to remember that we are all here for you and that we love you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, you’re-you’re really freaking me out.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: We can’t find Chandler…—‘s vest. We can’t find Chandler’s vest.
lines.stage_direction: Phoebe sticks her head and motions that they found Chandler

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How can that be?! Oh wait! Wait! Are you, are you serious?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Found the vest! I mean we’re gonna have to keep an eye on it, y’know make sure we don’t lose it again…

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh wow! Okay. Don’t scare me like that okay? I mean for a minute there I was like, "Oh my God! The worst has happened!"

scenes.scene_description: Monica goes into the bathroom and Rachel thinks quickly.
Monica goes into the bathroom and Phoebe and Rachel breathe a sigh of relief.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I would sooner die in this hellhole then see her back with you!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: That can be arranged.

scenes.scene_description: The Movie Set, Joey and Richard are in the middle of a scene. They are both holding swords.

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: Let’s reset.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?! He got me! Owwwwww!!!

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: Let’s take it from there.

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Are you a little off today? It’s going terribly slowly.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look, my best friends are getting married in like an hour. Okay? And I’m the minister. Please! Please! Can you pull it together?

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Of course! I’m-I’m sorry. I-I’d hate you to miss anything like that on account of me. I can do this!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thank you. Thank you.

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: Still rolling, annnnd action!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I would sooner die in this hellhole then see her back with you!

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Now, that can be arranged! Slippery little bugger!
lines.stage_direction: He brings his sword back and drops it, causing it to fly over the wall.

scenes.scene_description: Richard thrusts, misses Joey by several feet and Joey screams in pain and drops to his knees.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So-so you two were married huh? What happened? You just drift apart?

scenes.scene_description: The Hotel, Monica’s room, Mr. and Mrs. Bing are staring at each other while Phoebe looks on.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.text: Here comes the bride.

scenes.scene_description: Rachel and Mrs. Geller enter.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God Monica!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I wanna wear this everyday.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You look so beautiful.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I’m so happy for me.

scenes.scene_description: Monica enters wearing her wedding dress.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! Did Chandler show up yet?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, we got him back. Everything’s fine.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Damnit!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What? Why? Where are you?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I’m still on the set!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey! The wedding is in less than an hour!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know! I’m sorry! The guy’s drunk, they won’t let me go until we get this.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! I’m gonna have to find another minister.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! No, I’m the minister! All right, look-look, put ‘em both on the phone, I’ll marry them right now.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ugh! Joey, I have to go.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! Don’t you hang up on me! I’ll marry you and me right now! I have the power!

scenes.scene_description: The phone rings and Rachel answers it.
She hangs up anyway.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: There you go. You put on a tuxedo! Now that wasn’t so scary, was it?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I’m telling you, just a little bit at a time.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah okay. Well, what’s the next little bit?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Getting married. Okay. Okay. You can, you can do that too! Just like you’ve done everything else!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah. You’re right. Hey I-I can do that.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, excuse me for a minute.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wh—Hey—Whoa-whoa, where, where you going?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ross, I am not gonna run away again! I just want to get a little fresh air.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay.

scenes.scene_description: Chandler’s Hotel Room, Ross is getting Chandler ready.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh fresh air!

scenes.scene_description: Chandler goes out into the hall and lights up a cigarette.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wait! Maybe, maybe you’re overreacting! You do that y’know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well Phoebe, we gotta do something! Well, y’know. I mean there’s no way Joey’s gonna make it in time. So I’m gonna through the hotel and see if there’s any other weddings going on.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay. Oh but don’t tell them Monica’s pregnant because, they frown on that.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay.

scenes.scene_description: He hears Phoebe and Rachel coming and hides in the ice machine room.
They head in separate directions and Chandler emerges and he’s so shocked that his cigarette is hanging from his lip.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Anastassakis/Papasifakis wedding, excellent! {It’s a good thing Jennifer Aniston is Greek, because she had to pronounce those names. Luckily for me, they were written on a sign.} Congratulations. Mazel Tov! Hi! Oh, great hat. Listen umm, I need you to perform another wedding. Can you do that?
lines.stage_direction: The happy couple emerges. To the best man and maid of honor The rabbi emerges. He’s wearing an interesting hat and she takes him over to talk.

lines.speaker: The Rabbi
lines.text: I don’t know. Are they Greek Orthodox?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! Yeah. They’re…they’re-they’re my friends, uh, Monica Stephanopolus and uh, and Chandler Acidofolus.

scenes.scene_description: The Hotel, Rachel is walking through the ballroom area and comes upon the sign for the Anastassakis/Papasifakis wedding.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi! Hi! Hi. Has umm, anyone seen Chandler?
lines.stage_direction: To Mrs. Bing Mr. Bing starts rubbing his arm.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: I thought he was with you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: He-he was with me umm, we’re playing a little game, y’know? Hide and seek.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: You can’t ask us son, that’s cheating.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You’re right, thanks for keeping me honest dad.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.text: Well, he better not come by here. He can’t see the bride in the wedding dress.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: As I recall when we got married, I saw the groom in the wedding dress.

lines.speaker: Mr. Bing
lines.text: But that was after the wedding, it’s not bad luck then.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Honey, it isn’t good luck.

scenes.scene_description: Monica’s Hotel Room, Chandler and Monica’s parents and Phoebe are there as Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh my God! Monica!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know! Hey, how’s Chandler doin’?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Great. He’s doing great. Don’t you worry about Chandler.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are you okay?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, you’re-you’re sweating.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: These-these are beads of joy.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh that’s sweet. Don’t touch me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh Phoebe, can I see you for a second?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah!

scenes.scene_description: Monica enters.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What’s going on?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Chandler’s gone again!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God! Why would you play hide and seek with someone you know is a flight risk?!

scenes.scene_description: They both go out into the hall.
Ross just glares at her.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Aaron! You gotta let me go. The guy’s hammered!

lines.speaker: The Director
lines.text: I’m sorry Joey, as long as he’s here and he’s conscious we’re still shooting.

scenes.scene_description: The Movie Set, Joey is walking up to the director, pleading with him to let him go.

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: You wouldn’t happen to have a very big fork?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So I uh, I just talked to the director. That’s it, we’re done for the day.

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Well have we finished the scene?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! You…you were wonderful.

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: As were you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So I got your car, it’s right outside.

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Why? Are we done for the day?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That’s what you told me.

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Oh, thank you. You’re welcome.
lines.stage_direction: He stands up, staggers to the couch, and starts to lie down.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No-no-no! We gotta go! Come on! Here we go.
lines.stage_direction: Joey picks him up in a fireman’s carry and carries him out.

lines.speaker: Richard
lines.text: Is that my ass?

scenes.scene_description: He walks away and Joey does Ross’s fist thing. He then enters Richard’s dressing room, to find Richard cutting his steak with his sword.
And as Joey walks out the door, Richard grabs a bottle of Scotch, just as the door closes and carries it with him.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: There he is!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

scenes.scene_description: The Hotel, Phoebe and Ross are looking for Chandler.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey! Oh!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You’re not getting away this time mister! Unless you want that ass kicking we talked about!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ross!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hiiii-Ya!! I’m serious! You’re not walking out on my sister!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That’s right! I’m not!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Then where the hell have you been?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know about Monica.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You know?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I heard you and Rachel talking.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?! What?! Talking about what?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You don’t know?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Know what—If somebody doesn’t tell me what’s going on right now…

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What? You’ll hi-ya?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Monica’s pregnant.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh my God. Oh my God! And you’re-you’re…you’re not freaking out?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well I was! Then I went down to the gift shop because I was out of cigarettes…

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Big picture please! So I was in the gift shop, and that’s when I uh, saw this. New York.) Yeah, y’know what? I thought anything that can fit into this, can’t be scary.
lines.stage_direction: He holds up a little, tiny baby jumper that reads I (heart

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well you obviously didn’t see Chucky 3.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But come on, look at how cute and small this is! So I got it to give Monica so she’d know I was okay.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Dude.

scenes.scene_description: Ross runs over and tackles him.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: Way to go son! I knew you’d find him!

scenes.scene_description: Mr. Geller turns the corner.

lines.speaker: Mr. Bing
lines.text: Our little boy is getting married.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Bing
lines.text: Oh look at you! So handsome!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You look beautiful mom. You look beautiful too dad. I love you both. I’m so glad you here.
lines.stage_direction: His dad clears his throat. He kisses his dad on the cheek He kisses his mom.

scenes.scene_description: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take , we’ve got guests seated, and Chandler starts walking down the aisle with his parents on either arm.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: The Rabbi
lines.text: Are you Chandler?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you Joey?

scenes.scene_description: He walks up onto the altar and notices the rabbi.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Huh. This is nice.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I’ve never walked down the aisle knowing it can’t end in divorce.

scenes.scene_description: Ross walks down the aisle with Phoebe and Rachel on his arms.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.text: Oh I wish you’re grandmother had lived to see this.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She’s right there.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Geller
lines.text: Not that old crow, my mother. Congratulations darling.
lines.stage_direction: They stop and she kisses Monica on the cheek.

lines.speaker: Mr. Geller
lines.text: I love you sweetheart.
lines.stage_direction: He kisses her and they sit down.

scenes.scene_description: Finally, Monica with her parents on her arms start down the aisle.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You look beautiful. Is this new?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Not now.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay.

scenes.scene_description: Chandler steps off the altar to greet his bride-to-be.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Who is this?

lines.speaker: The Rabbi
lines.text: I am Father Kalebasous.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: He’s Greek Orthodox.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: As are you…

lines.speaker: The Rabbi
lines.text: Let us begin. Dearly beloved…

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That’s my line! I can take it from here, thanks. Dearly beloved, I’m sorry I’m a little late. You may be confused by this now, but you won’t be Memorial Day weekend 2002. Well, let’s get started before the groom takes off again. Huh? We are gathered here today, to join this man and this woman in the bonds of holy matrimony. I’ve known Monica and Chandler for a long time, and I can not imagine two people more perfect for each other. And now, as I’ve left my notes in my dressing room. We shall proceed to the vows. Monica?
lines.stage_direction: entering He walks up the aisle and to the rabbi To all He’s still in costume Monica is shocked and looks around.

scenes.scene_description: They both step up onto the altar and she notices the rabbi.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: He took off?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Go on! Go on.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler, for so long I…I wondered if I would ever find my prince, my soul mate. Then three years ago, at another wedding I turned to a friend for comfort. And in stead, I found everything that I’d ever been looking for my whole life. And now…here we are…with our future before us…and I only want to spend it with you, my prince, my soul mate, my friend. Unless you don’t want to. You go!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Chandler?

scenes.scene_description: She turns to get her vows from Rachel.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, that’s okay. Monica I thought this was going to be the most difficult thing I ever gonna had to do. But when I saw you walking down that aisle I realized how simple it was. I love you. Any surprises that come our way it’s okay, because I will always love you. You are the person I was meant to spend the rest of my life with. You wanna know if I’m sure?
lines.stage_direction: To Ross Ross nods and retreats. He leans in and kisses her.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You may not kiss the bride. So, I guess by the powers vested in my by the state of New York and the Internet guys, I now pronounce you husband and wife. Oh wait! Do you take each other?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I do.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I do.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah you do!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Rings?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Aw crap! Okay—uh…uh let’s-let’s do the rings.

scenes.scene_description: Ross leans in to give Chandler his vows.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: We good? Yeah? Good? Once again, I pronounce you husband and wife. Now kiss her again.

scenes.scene_description: Chandler and Monica both turn, take the rings from Ross and Rachel respectively, and place them on each other’s fingers.

scenes.location: The moment we waited for has finally arrived. It’s time for Monica and Chandler’s wedding. We’ve got violins playing Every Breath You Take

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I love you. And I know about the baby.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What baby?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Our baby.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We have a baby?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Phoebe found your pregnancy test in the trash.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I didn’t take a pregnancy test.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Then…who did?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh and they’re gonna have a baby.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh-huh.

scenes.scene_description: They kiss and everyone applauds.
